label: Crypto Top 50
source: Approximate top-50-by-market-cap crypto snapshot used as the seed for the screener's crypto universe. The live path (``resolve_universe`` cache-on-miss) fetches the canonical list from ccxt at first use and caches for 24h via ``services.data_cache``. The shipped seed lets tests + offline first-launches resolve without a live ccxt round-trip. Symbol shape is ccxt's ``BASE/QUOTE`` convention; the screener fans out via the existing ``ccxt_provider.get_ticker`` path on Binance by default.
